notes:
v1.10.3 Hotfix
🔧 Cut-In Loading: Cut-ins now wait for artwork to load and decode before the animation starts, preventing slow-loading large images from cutting the animation short. Applies to personal cut-ins, All-Out Attacks, and in-element playback.

📌 Very large images can still delay the first play while clients download them, so resizing oversized art or using WebP is still recommended.

announcement.title: 🎬 Cinematic Cut-ins v1.10.3
announcement.content:
v1.10.3: Large Image Loading Hotfix

  • Cut-In Loading: Personal cut-ins, All-Out Attacks, and in-element playback now wait until artwork is loaded and decoded before starting the animation.
  • Large Image Handling: Slow-loading images should no longer produce truncated, half-finished animations. Very large files can still take a moment on first play, so resized or WebP assets are recommended.
